message:
test: pin mqueue.h conformance via differential harness

Adds tests/conformance_diff_mqueue.rs covering 5 functions:
- mq_unlink: ENOENT edge
- mq_close: invalid-fd edge
- libc-baseline mq_open+mq_send+mq_receive: full round-trip via glibc
- fl::mq_open documented (DISC-MQ-001): fl returns -1 even when glibc
  succeeds on the same host, likely a variadic arg-extraction issue

5 tests pass.

Beads: bd-mq1 (harness), bd-mq2 (fl::mq_open variadic fix)
